model: RandomForest(600, class_weight=balanced) on 752 Sakar acoustic features
input: a 752-value feature vector in the Sakar column order (see features list in the .pkl)
note: Input must be the Sakar feature schema (jitter/shimmer/HNR/MFCC/TQWT). Extracting these from arbitrary audio requires the Sakar feature pipeline.
aggregation_note: per_speaker averages predicted probability across a speaker's recordings
